query:
INSERT INTO `idSequences` (`projectId`, `entityType`, `prefix`, `currentNumber`, `minNumber`, `maxNumber`, `padLength`) VALUES
(2, 'Requirement', 'Q', 1, 1, 9999, 4),
(2, 'Task', 'T', 1, 1, 9999, 4),
(2, 'Issue', 'I', 1, 1, 9999, 4),
(2, 'Dependency', 'D', 1, 1, 9999, 4),
(2, 'Deliverable', 'DL', 1, 1, 9999, 4),
(2, 'Task Group', 'TG', 1, 1, 999, 3),
(2, 'Issue Group', 'IG', 1, 1, 999, 3)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `currentNumber` = `currentNumber`;
